Oxford City Council
Revenue Services, PO Box 10, Oxford, OX1 1EN

1 March 2026

Dear Resident,

COUNCIL TAX DEMAND — 2026/27

Your council tax bill for the period 1 April 2026 to 31 March 2027 is £1,642.00.

Your payment is due in 10 monthly instalments beginning 1 April 2026. The first instalment of £164.20 is due by 1 April 2026.

If you are having difficulty paying, you may be eligible for Council Tax Reduction. Please contact our benefits team on 01865 252811 or visit www.oxford.gov.uk/counciltax to apply.

Payment options:
- Direct debit (call 01865 252811 to set up)
- Online at www.oxford.gov.uk/pay
- By phone on 01865 252811

If you fail to pay an instalment on time, the full annual amount may become due immediately and recovery action may be taken.

Yours sincerely,
Revenue Services
Oxford City Council
